sourceMovie.title: Our Family Wedding
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Our Family Wedding works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Night at the Museum
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Our Family Wedding clicked for you, Night at the Museum (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Our Family Wedding?
faq.answer: Try Night at the Museum, A Bug's Life, Meet the Parents—each shares DNA with Our Family Wedding while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Our Family Wedding?
faq.answer: Our Family Wedding (2010) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Our Family Wedding worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
